DECLARATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CABRERA, MANUEL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUIZ, HAYDEE RUIZ, GILBERTO RUIZ MIRANDA, RICARDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3374 24TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL FEB-14-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, UNTIL 05:00PM.
